creator: statue@softwareliberty.org
text:
update ac13.tar.Z to ac14.tar.Z
	add support for Adobe Systems Tech Note #5080 "Adobe-CNS1-4 Character Collection for CID-Keyed Fonts"

Adobe-CNS1-4 Character Collection for CID-Keyed Fonts 
http://partners.adobe.com/asn/developer/pdfs/tn/5080.Adobe-CNS1-4.pdf
#5080    9/8/01     (PDF: 9.6 MB / 169 pages)
The purpose of this Traditional Chinese character collection is to provide support for the Big Five and CNS 11643-1992 character set standards. Supported encodings include 7-bit, EUC, and Big Five.
